questions.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
questions.english: If I had known, I would have come.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + would have + past participle (imagined/hypothetical past result)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had known, I would have come."

questions.hindi: अगर उसने मेहनत की होती, तो वह पास हो जाता।
questions.english: If he had worked hard, he would have passed.

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If he had worked hard, he would have passed."

questions.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह खरीदता।
